name: XAU_BB_RSI_MeanRev_M5
hypothesis: On XAUUSD M5, when price closes outside Bollinger(20, 2.0) with RSI(7) extreme, price reverts toward the middle band within 30 bars, provided BB width is above its 30th percentile (avoid dead ranges).

entry_rules.long: close < lower_bb AND rsi7 < 15 AND bb_width_pct > 30
entry_rules.short: close > upper_bb AND rsi7 > 85 AND bb_width_pct > 30

regime_filter.rationale: trade only in non-dead, non-crash volatility
